title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Sugar Cosmetics

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Sugar Cosmetics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
